title: Subagent Report
description: Platform-level schema for a subagent report. See docs/subagent-schemas.md for full semantics, invariants, and customization boundaries.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for the report. Must start with 'report-'.

contract_id.description: Identifier of the corresponding contract. Must start with 'contract-'.

changed_artifacts.description: Artifacts actually modified during execution. Should not be vague descriptions.

verification_results.description: Verification steps executed and their results. Should not be empty descriptions.

unresolved_items.description: Open items that remain unresolved after execution.

assumptions.description: Assumptions made during execution that the supervisor should verify.

escalation_recommendation.description: Whether escalation is recommended and to whom.
